user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the list of confirmation email templates with their type and description, so that I know which emails are sent during the confirmation process
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Email Templates screen; When the page loads; Then email templates are listed with Template Type ID, Email type, Description and Task columns

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to view the details of a specific email template, so that I can review its content and configuration
acceptance_criteria: Given an email template is listed; When I click View on that row; Then the template details are displayed

user_story: As an HR admin, I want to refresh the email templates list, so that I see the most current set of templates
acceptance_criteria: Given I am on the Email Templates screen; When I click Refresh; Then the list reloads with current data
